description_long: This is a modern, streamlined airplane with a sleek fuselage and sharply swept-back wings, designed for high-speed flight. The wings are mid-mounted and feature a moderate sweep, with no visible winglets. The aircraft has a pair of engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage, flanking a prominent vertical stabilizer and a T-tail configuration. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a large, dark canopy and multiple windows along the sides for passengers. The landing gear appears to be retractable, with the main gear housed under the wings and the nose gear under the forward fuselage.
description: A sleek, modern airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, rear-mounted engines, and a T-tail. The cockpit is forward with a prominent canopy and side windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the full span of the swept wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, passenger windows, and rear-mounted engines with a T-tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engines, T-tail, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage, windows, and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are straight with a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage on either side of the tail.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large canopy and multiple side windows, likely multi-seat.
